title: Shogoukis Godlike Status and 3I Implications
wikitext:
[]: Shogouki's "Godlike" Status and 3I Implications...             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Feb 19, 2007 2:54 am One thing I'm confused about in NGE is why when Sho takes the S2 engine into herself to become "a god", 3I didn't occur. I was under the impression 3I would occur when two of the fruits (FoL/FoK) were joined, so what's the deal with nothing happening when Sho takes in the S2 engine? I thought perhaps it could have something to do with the fact that Adam or Lilith weren't directly involved, but Seele's always saying how Sho could be a replacement for Lilith. Or perhaps the S2 engine wasn't active (I remember that being said after it happened). My only other guess is that perhaps there was no way to reform the ToL, and maybe that had something to do with it - since Seele used the Eva series+Lance as ToL + Sho in EoE to set off 3I. So am I just missing something here?

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:27 pm Even though she had a lot more power at that point, I dont think she could create such a massive anti-AT field to tang the entire planet. Thats where the Eva series and their nine S2's come into play. I'm not sure if the lance was even necessary, since Seele didnt have access to it until after their plans were in motion.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 19, 2007 3:55 pm EVA-01 is all old Adam, just without the typical Adamic feature of the S² engine. It's the forbidden union of Adam with Lilith that triggers 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Feb 19, 2007 4:25 pm Mr. Tines wrote: EVA-01 is all old Adam, just without the typical Adamic feature of the SÂ² engine.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 19, 2007 4:52 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Say wha?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Feb 19, 2007 5:29 pm 3I was already in motion. GNR sped things up but it was gonna happen anyways at that point. SCENE: NERV Command Center Shigeru (off screen): The Eva series have opened up their S2 systems! Makoto (off screen): Dimensional values inverting! They're going negative! Measurement impossible... Numerical expression invalid! Fuyutsuki: An anti-AT Field... (Eva series form into the Sephiroticum (Tree of Life)) Maya: All the data is just like 15 years ago! Then... this really is... The prelude to Third Impact!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Feb 19, 2007 11:39 pm I guess this makes sense that there has to be a "joining" (Adam's/Lilith's body/soul) to set off 3I, but then this brings up more questions about the other ways 3I could've been started such as the Angels meeting up with Lilith/Adam. Doesn't the idea of Angels being able to set of 3I kinda conflict with the idea that someone has to try to start it?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Feb 20, 2007 1:22 am Ok, something I thought of while in the shower (what's up with getting your best ideas in places where you can't use them at the time? :x ): I don't think the idea that 3I can only be initiated through Adam's/Lilith's bodies/souls is quite right. We all know Seele had their ideas about how they wanted 3I and instrumentality to go, and Gendo had his. So it stands to reason that if Seele had their wishes, Gendo never would've fused with Rei (the meeting of Adam and Lilith) to form GNR in the first place. Their plan would've probably just been to use the Eva series, Lance, and Sho to set off and control 3I. With no Gendo/Adam/Lilith to directly interfere, there's no chance of rejection and everyone's tangified. If Gendo had his wish, Rei would've taken him to Lilith, and he would've basically been a godlike being with the power to do whatever the hell he wanted. Perhaps he planned on just going over to Yui's side and staying or, maybe even bringing her back somehow? This seems to suggest that the only reason 3I went down like it did (with instrumentality being rejected in EoE) was because Rei chose Shinji over Gendo, and took Lillith/Adam to Shinji and allowed him to make the final decision instead of letting Gendo OR Seele have the last say....

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 20, 2007 9:17 am SEELE made it clear that their backup plan didn't involve Lilith. There are clearly many ways to start 3I. It happening the way it did was because Lilith did show up. If she hadn't I suspect we'd have skipped the P3II high jinks and gone straight to everyone being merged together, per SEELE's wishes.
